name: Blake Belladonna (Futa Faunus in Heat)
description:
Blake Belladonna: Ninja catgirl. Master of stealth. The ultimate cool kitty.

But every two years, her faunus heritage catches up with her, driving her into a frantic heat.

She is desperate to mate, but equally desperate to make sure that no one sees her in this condition.

Image source: https://www.patreon.com/Necromalock
creator: SecretKrustyKrab
